---
name: Open issue (Manual Markdown)
about: Track an implementation problem that should be solved later but is not a deferment using the classic markdown template flow.
title: "Open issue: <short summary>"
labels: "implementation-issue, issue-type: open-issue"
---

## Template Content

### Summary

Brief statement of the issue.

### Created phase

Phase N

### Source

Checklist step, review, workflow, or developer source.

### Scheduled target

Required for Critical and High issues.

### Priority

Low | Medium | High | Critical

### Notes

Additional context that should remain visible in the index.

### Rationale and context

Describe the problem and why it should be tracked.

### Impact

Impact on implementation, architecture, timeline, or users.

### Implementation notes

Technical constraints, context, and follow-up details.

### Acceptance / closing criteria

State what must be completed before the issue can be closed.
